in a nativity, the person will be liable to wandering, will indulge in bad business, be an able
speaker, be fortunate, deformed in respect of some limb, will have few relatives, be fond of
wars, will lose his first wife, will deal in liquors and will earn through prostitutes to only lose.
15-16. MARS IN SCORPIO.
If Mars occupies Scorpio at birth, the native will be attached to trade, will be interested in Vedic
knowledge, be leader of thieves, skilful in his duties, be interested in wars, be highly sinful,
will do big crimes, will be perfidious towards his enemies, will betray, be disposed towards
killing, be unhelpful, be a talebearer, will be endowed with lands, sons and wife and be
troubled by poison, fire, weapons and wounds.
17-18. MARS IN SAGITTARIUS.
Should Mars be in Sagittarius, the native will have many wounds, be emaciated, be harsh in
speech, crafty, alienated, be a warrior endowed with chariots, elephants and Army men, will
